summary: Frontend testing of How To Use page (/how-to-use) completed successfully. All new features verified: (1) Step 8 Reports tab shows 3 colourful report cards, (2) Individual report screenshots with colour headings in 3-column grid, (3) Step 7 Progress shows Appeal Checklist with ticked items, (4) Step 9 Barrister View has blue unlock notice box mentioning all 3 reports requirement, (5) Step 3 Documents shows demo case (Dummy Murder Appeal Demonstration) NOT Homann.
context_for_next_testing_agent: How To Use page at /how-to-use fully tested with all new features. Step 8 now has 'Each Report Type' section with 3 individual report screenshots (quick-summary green, full-detailed blue, extensive-log purple) in a 3-column grid. Step 9 Barrister View has blue unlock notice box. All screenshots show demo case data (Dummy Murder Appeal Demonstration).
